response.global_analysis: The video contains conversational dialogue and game sound effects from a 'Holokart Time Attack' challenge. No vocal musical performances were detected, so the reference JSON was ignored for lyrics. I have prioritized transcribing the spoken dialogue and relevant on-screen text (rules, final times) while ensuring timestamps are strictly tied to the audio vocalizations and visual cues.

subtitles.original: No, she's so good. Have confidence.
subtitles.english: No, she's so good. Have confidence.

subtitles.original: Yeah, you're good at gaming, so maybe driving is also very good.
subtitles.english: Yeah, you're good at gaming, so maybe driving is also very good.

subtitles.original: I win! I win! I win! I win!
subtitles.english: I win! I win! I win! I win!

subtitles.original: Just checking the time of how long it was.
subtitles.english: Just checking the time of how long it was.

subtitles.original: Everyone's my teachers. Only Sora-chan so far has driven safely.
subtitles.english: Everyone's my teachers. Only Sora-chan so far has driven safely.

subtitles.original: Oh wait, time is coming. Oh wait!
subtitles.english: Oh wait, time is coming. Oh wait!

subtitles.original: Oh, so finally, you were 1 minute and 11 seconds!
subtitles.english: Oh, so finally, you were 1 minute and 11 seconds!

subtitles.original: So that means you were the latest.
subtitles.english: So that means you were the latest.

subtitles.original: You got four times explosions, so that means 20 seconds added.
subtitles.english: You got four times explosions, so that means 20 seconds added.

subtitles.original: Anyway, I still had the time of my life. It was a blast!
subtitles.english: Anyway, I still had the time of my life. It was a blast!

subtitles.original: Well, for our last challenger, we have prepared for you a special course because you are our student, right?
subtitles.english: Well, for our last challenger, we have prepared for you a special course because you are our student, right?

subtitles.original: Since you've already seen this, you have an advantage going last, so we're not going to give you that advantage.
subtitles.english: Since you've already seen this, you have an advantage going last, so we're not going to give you that advantage.

subtitles.original: Oh! Wow! It's Justice! It's Justice!
subtitles.english: Oh! Wow! It's Justice! It's Justice!

subtitles.original: Yeah, Justice 3D was not in our budget, so we have cutouts. Thanks, guys.
subtitles.english: Yeah, Justice 3D was not in our budget, so we have cutouts. Thanks, guys.

subtitles.original: Also, just so you know, this is your driver's practical, so you're going to have to beat our average time.
subtitles.english: Also, just so you know, this is your driver's practical, so you're going to have to beat our average time.

subtitles.original: And our average time was 1 minute and 8 seconds!
subtitles.english: And our average time was 1 minute and 8 seconds!

subtitles.original: Rule: Driving test cleared if average time is faster than 1:08!
subtitles.english: Rule: Driving test cleared if average time is faster than 1:08!

subtitles.original: I got this. Okay, watch... watch me.
subtitles.english: I got this. Okay, watch... watch me.

subtitles.original: It's okay. Guys, don't worry. Easy, easy, easy. Easy.
subtitles.english: It's okay. Guys, don't worry. Easy, easy, easy. Easy.

subtitles.original: This is what I've been training for for the last 10 minutes. Don't worry about it.
subtitles.english: This is what I've been training for for the last 10 minutes. Don't worry about it.

subtitles.original: Anything you'd like to say before the race?
subtitles.english: Anything you'd like to say before the race?

subtitles.original: Spin to win! Spin to win!
subtitles.english: Spin to win! Spin to win!

subtitles.original: Yeah, you should be spinning as much as possible.
subtitles.english: Yeah, you should be spinning as much as possible.

subtitles.original: Yeah, I should be spinning. Thank you. Okay, let's go.
subtitles.english: Yeah, I should be spinning. Thank you. Okay, let's go.

subtitles.original: Any advice for Cece-senpai? Okay, advice?
subtitles.english: Any advice for Cece-senpai? Okay, advice?

subtitles.original: Okay, the Holokart Time Attack starts... now!
subtitles.english: Okay, the Holokart Time Attack starts... now!

subtitles.original: Go, Cecilia, go! Show us your driving skills!
subtitles.english: Go, Cecilia, go! Show us your driving skills!
